raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 1095 proposes to include waste heat recovery from data centers as an eligible project under the Climate Catalyst Revolving Loan Fund.",
    "Data centers consume approximately 4% of California's electricity, a figure projected to rise to 12% by 2028.",
    "The increasing demand for cloud services and artificial intelligence applications contributes to the rising electricity consumption of data centers.",
    "Much of the heat generated by data centers is released into the atmosphere, leading to energy inefficiency and unnecessary emissions.",
    "Repurposing waste heat from data centers conserves energy and reduces operational costs and greenhouse gas emissions."
  ]
}
```
